description.value: Price 20,800 gp; Slot none; CL 8th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura moderate varies DESCRIPTION Crumbling bark continuously flakes from this solid, aged oak staff without diminishing its size. It allows the use of the following spells: Calcific touch (2 charges) Corrosive touch (1 charge) Touch injection (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells calcific touch, corrosive touch, touch injection; Cost 10,400 gp
